creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Update sysutils/ansible: 1.2.1 -> 1.2.2
	Changes: https://raw.github.com/ansible/ansible/release1.2.2/CHANGELOG.md

	In ansible 1.2.1 release, host key checking was enabled on default.
	This was slow with paramiko. This was slow enough with paramiko to
	warrant a same-day release of 1.2.2, in which it can be disabled
	independently of openssh.

	This patch also updates WWW: to the new (1.2+) website.

Fix: Apply this patch.
